title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CONCOR

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at CONCOR
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Logistics Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
